title: passiflora edulis var. keri
intro: Passiflora edulis var. keri, also known as the yellow passionfruit or keri passionfruit, is a type of passionflower plant that belongs to the Passifloraceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can be used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other sleep disorders. The health benefits of Passiflora edulis var. keri include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
